message.content:
Thoroughly explore the backend codebase to understand existing patterns. I need to understand:

1. Read server/routes/routes.js - understand how requireAuth, optionalAuth, imageUploader are defined and how routes are structured
2. Read server/server.js - understand how routers are mounted
3. Read server/services/interactService.js - understand the toggle pattern for likes/bookmarks
4. Read server/services/uploadService.js - understand cursor pagination pattern and how services interact with Supabase
5. Read any controller file (e.g. server/controller/) to see the thin controller pattern
6. Read server/services/ to understand how Supabase client is imported and used

Return the COMPLETE content of each file you read. I need exact code patterns to follow.
